name: Relay Roofs
description: The rooftop relay farm crackles under wet wind and the city below looks like it is trying to fake being infinite.
detail: Antenna ribs creak overhead. Bad signal and bad ideas both travel quickly here.

fixtures.name: antenna ribs
fixtures.inspect: The antenna ribs creak like old saints arguing over bandwidth and burial rights.

fixtures.name: stair brick
fixtures.inspect: One brick on the stair has been worked loose more than once. There is dust on it that suggests a hand recently checked it.

mood: The wind is turning the antenna mast in a register most weather doesn't reach.
Tonight there is a printed Bureau forecast wedged under the stair brick, half-folded over a courier handle.
The relay light has been amber for an hour and amber is a colour the relay does not officially have.
